import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/ControlCenter.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();

export default function ControlCenter() {
  _s();
  const [showHealthModal, setShowHealthModal] = useState(false);
  const [showComplianceModal, setShowComplianceModal] = useState(false);
  const [showAIModal, setShowAIModal] = useState(false);
  const [showCreateTenantModal, setShowCreateTenantModal] = useState(false);
  const [showPublishPolicyModal, setShowPublishPolicyModal] = useState(false);
  const [showBackupModal, setShowBackupModal] = useState(false);
  const [showAIEvaluationModal, setShowAIEvaluationModal] = useState(false);
  const [showLogsModal, setShowLogsModal] = useState(false);
  const [showRequestDetailsModal, setShowRequestDetailsModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedRequest, setSelectedRequest] = useState(null);
  const [organizationRequests, setOrganizationRequests] = useState(mockRequests);
  const [newTenant, setNewTenant] = useState({
    name: "",
    sector: "",
    jurisdiction: "",
    language: "en",
    plan: "Professional"
  });
  const handleApproveRequest = (requestId) => {
    const request = organizationRequests.find((r) => r.id === requestId);
    if (!request) return;
    setOrganizationRequests(organizationRequests.map(
      (r) => r.id === requestId ? { ...r, status: "approved" } : r
    ));
    alert(`✅ Organization request approved!

${request.organizationName} has been provisioned.

A confirmation email has been sent to ${request.adminEmail} with login credentials.`);
  };
  const handleRejectRequest = (requestId) => {
    const request = organizationRequests.find((r) => r.id === requestId);
    if (!request) return;
    if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to reject the request from ${request.organizationName}?`)) {
      setOrganizationRequests(organizationRequests.map(
        (r) => r.id === requestId ? { ...r, status: "rejected" } : r
      ));
      alert(`Request from ${request.organizationName} has been rejected.`);
    }
  };
  const pendingRequestsCount = organizationRequests.filter((r) => r.status === "pending").length;

      fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/ControlCenter.tsx",
      lineNumber: 669,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
      FGCmp,
      {
        _fgT: OrgRequestDetailModal,
        _fgS: "hap412",
        _fgB: 1779104380244,
        isOpen: showRequestDetailsModal,
        onClose: () => {
          setShowRequestDetailsModal(false);
          setSelectedRequest(null);
        },
        request: selectedRequest,
        onApprove: (id) => {
          handleApproveRequest(id);
          setShowRequestDetailsModal(false);
        },
        onReject: (id, reason) => {
          console.log("Reject reason:", reason);
          handleRejectRequest(id);
          setShowRequestDetailsModal(false);
        },
        "data-fg-hap412": "418.272:653.338:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/ControlCenter.tsx:674:7:31810:527:e:OrgRequestDetailModal::::::DtB9"
      },
      void 0,

        columnNumber: 7

if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/ControlCenter.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
